scores.correctness_notes: Missing the syslog protocol type entirely (gold standard lists 3 types: loki, opentelemetry, syslog). The OTLP type name is wrong — gold standard uses 'opentelemetry' not 'otlp'. Also missing auto-label details (pebble_service, service.name) and syslog location format (tcp:// or udp://). Core Loki YAML structure is correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: Names the OTLP type 'otlp' but it should be 'opentelemetry' per the gold standard — this is a fabricated parameter value. The service removal syntax with '-' prefix (e.g., '-all', '-svc2') is not mentioned in the gold standard and may be accurate Pebble behavior but cannot be confirmed from the reference.
